SELECT dateName('week', event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date >= toDateTime('2021-01-01');
SELECT dateName('dayofyear', event_date), dateName('day', event_date) FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_date, dateName('weekday', event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE dateName('year', event_date) = '2021';
WITH (SELECT MAX(event_date) FROM test_dates) AS max_date SELECT dateName('second', max_date);
WITH (SELECT event_date FROM test_dates) AS dates SELECT dateName('quarter', event_date) FROM dates;
SELECT event_date, dateName('hour', event_date) AS hour_part FROM test_dates WHERE dateName('month', event_date) = '01';
SELECT dateName('month', t.event_date) FROM (SELECT event_date FROM test_dates) AS t ORDER BY event_date;
WITH toDateTime('2021-12-31 23:59:59') AS end_date SELECT dateName('year', end_date), dateName('day', end_date) WHERE dateName('month', end_date) = '12';
